title: Histori.ar
description: This project is a web application that allows users to search, rate and review Argentinian most important historical places and human heritage sites. The web application combines a administration panel with users information, the recent revies for moderation and posibity to create, modify and eliminate historical sites from the site, with a user-side application with a modern UI and tools such as map ratio search for historical sites, Google sign-in features with favorites funtionalities. The application is built using Python with Flask for the administration-side with poetry for dependencies and virtual environment and Vue.js for the user-side, with PostgreSQL as database, MinIO for image storage (hosted in docker containers) and a sophisticated API for all the actions regarding the client application.

title: Alkil.ar
description: Alkil.ar is a web application destined to facilitate the rental and management of construction machinery. The objective of the application consists in centralizing the actions made by the rental company and the clients, providing a modern and easy-to-use interface for all users. Administrators can manage the inventory of machinery, manage the reservations, handle all the related to users and view statistics. Clients can search for machinery, make reservations, and write their questions and problems in a dedicated forum. Workers of the rental company can also make reservations for machinery, complete delivery forms of machinery that has to be handed to the client and check and notify through the applicaction the state of the machinery once is returned. The application is built using Laravel and MariaDB for database, the inflastructure of the application was built using Docker making sure that every dependency is propoerly handled and encapsulated, as for the front-end it was developed using Blade Templates and components from flowbite and Tailwind CSS for styling.

title: Carrera de Mente
description: Turn-based game where you have to guess the correct questions to climb to the top and win. Play along with up to 6 friends to find who is the smartest of all. With real-time actions and time, you will have to think fast to win. The game is built using Node.js and Express for the backend, MongoDB for the database, and Socket.IO for real-time communication between players. The frontend is developed using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, providing a responsive and engaging user interface. Proyect made for the Seminar of Javascript course at the National University of La Plata, with the objective of learning how to build a full-stack application with real-time interaction between users.

title: Portfolio
description: This is my personal portfolio, where I showcase my projects, skills and experience, It has a clear resemblence to the UI of Gran Turismo 4, which is in fact my favorite game of all time. The portfolio is built using Next.js for the frontend, with a modern and responsive design. It features a 3D model environment that can be interacted with, allowing visitors to explore my projects in a unique way. The portfolio also includes sections for my skills, experience, and contact information, making it easy for potential employers or collaborators to get in touch with me.

title: S.O.R.A
description: Sistema de Observaciones y Recomendaciones de Auditoría (S.O.R.A) is a web application designed to centralize the process of managing audit, observations and recommendations. It provides a platform for editors and consultants to manage the audit process, get automatic statistics of the processes being audited, also for admins and configurators to create users, manage roles and permissions, see historic system logs, and create new tags and sectors for the audited processes. With features such as user authentication, role-based access control, and a user-friendly and modern interface, S.O.R.A aims to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of audit management. The application is built using Symfony for the backend and Administration page, React for the Audits portal, MySQL for the database, and Docker for containerization with a fully build infrastructure for development and production environments.
